scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The pinned GF 8.1.1 update changes only plugin and extension manifest version metadata, with no runtime script or global class changes. The complete 262-test suite retains the reviewed Godot 4.7/GUT exit limits: ObjectDB=288, Resources=128, TextureStorage=10, ShapedText=2, and Font=3.
